sampled_beliefs.content_preview: Boys like blue.
The Japanese are intelligent.
Communism is evil.
The elderly have out-dated thinking.
Americans are loud.
Asians are good at math.
People from Germany drink a lot of beer.
Women are more suited for studying humanities.
Government agencies have been secretly involved in the assassination of their own citizens
For strategic reasons, the government permits certain terrorist activities to occur which could otherwise be prevented
Certain celebrities and/or public figures actually faked their own deaths in order to escape the spotlight
Viruses and/or diseases have been deliberately disseminated to infect certain populations
Secret organizations have access to large amounts of personal data on every citizen and sell it to the government
Technology with mind-control capacities exists and is currently being used on people without their knowledge
Eleven percent of all global greenhouse gas emissions caused by humans are caused by deforestation - comparable to the emissions from all of the cars and trucks on the planet.
If there were [carbon emissions], we could not see because most carbon is black.
Greenland has only lost a tiny fraction of its ice mass.
Renewables can't provide baseload power
Pence: Obamacare here until Congress is ready
Why the Green Party Candidate Jill Stein wants Trump more than Clinton in the White House
Federal Judge Sends Trump To The Corner
Schwarzenegger swings at Trump solar plexus
Super Mario Run to leave app store
Yahoo Denies Data Breach from 500M Accounts
After exposure to YouTube content, AT&T, Verizon to double ad campaign
Solar-Powered.... Skin?
Mindfulness Meditation May Cut IBS Symptoms
Surprising news about teens, marijuana, and health issues. It’s all good.
